message:
feat(ui): improve file reservations page with advisory system explanation

Add explanatory banner to file reservations page clarifying that reservations are advisory signals (not hard locks) and providing link to enforcement documentation.

## Changes

**Layout improvements**:
- Changed icon from generic 'lock' to 'shield-alert' (better represents advisory nature)
- Reorganized header with improved spacing and flex layout
- Moved count display to separate line with improved formatting

**Educational content**:
- Added prominent blue banner explaining advisory system
- Clarified that agents CAN edit files despite reservations
- Added link to pre-commit hook enforcement documentation
- Improved copy: "When agents want to edit files, they can 'reserve' them to signal their intent"

## Motivation

Without this explanation, users seeing the "File Reservations" page might assume:
- Reservations are hard locks (they're not)
- Conflicts automatically block edits (they don't, just warn)
- The feature is broken because agents can still edit reserved files

This banner proactively educates users about the advisory nature of the system and directs them to opt-in enforcement via pre-commit hooks.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
